content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Hoarder
description: Legendary Hoarder is a Legendary class mod for Salvador in Borderlands 2. It is a Vladof mod.
notes: Added with Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge. It cannot be obtained without this DLC.

special.description: At maximum level it provides a team-wide ammo regeneration bonus of +4.5. The item uses the standard Hoarder skin to help players tell it apart.
special.title: "Ain't got time for dilly-dally."
